description.from: Deals 204*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 100% Physical DEF Physical DMG to enemies within range, knocking them back, and reduces their ATK by 24% and ATK Spd by 18% for 4sec.
description.to: Deals 1405*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+100% Physical DEF Physical DMG to enemies within range, knocking them back, and reduces their ATK by 25% and ATK Spd by 20% for 4sec.

description.from: For 17sec, increases P.DEF of the 4allies with the lowest P.DEF by 101*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)), increases their P.Block Chance by 140, and reduces P.DMG taken by 11%.
description.to: For 14sec, increases all allies' Physical DEF by 98*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)), Physical Block Chance by 150, and reduces Physical DMG taken by 10%.

description.from: On Block, deals 48*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+36.7% ATK Physical DMG in front, reduces the target's ATK by 4% for 6sec, and increases your Physical DEF by 6%. These effects stack up to 4 times.
description.to: On Block, deals 48*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+36.7% ATK Physical DMG in front, reduces the target's ATK by 3.5% for 6sec, and increases your Physical DEF by 9%. These effects stack up to 4 times.

light.to: Physical Defense increase amount increases by 50%.

dark.from: Physical Block Chance additionally increases by 110.
dark.to: Physical Block Chance additionally increases by 100.

description.from: [Shield Strike] reduces the P.DEF of hit enemies by 25% and their P.Crit Resist by {0} for 4 sec.
description.to: [Shield Strike] reduces the P.DEF of hit enemies by 25% and their P.Crit Resist by 210 for 4 sec.

description.from: [Guardian Shield] Removes negative effects from self and increases DEF boost by {0}%.
description.to: [Guardian Shield] increases effect duration by 4.5 sec and boosts DEF increase by {0}%.

dark.from: At the start of each battle, increases all allies' Max HP by 4%. This effect stacks up to 3 times and cannot be dispelled.
dark.to: At the start of each battle, increases all allies' Max HP by 10%. This effect stacks up to 3 times and cannot be dispelled.

description.from: Every 3 Skill uses, increases P.DEF of the 4allies with the lowest P.DEF by {0}% and ATK by {1}% for 15 sec.
description.to: Every 3 skills used, increases all allies' Physical Defense by {0}% and Attack by {1}% for 15 sec. The Physical Defense increase is applied at 2 times its value to the 4 allies with the lowest Physical Defense.
